anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The accepted standard declares this exact refine-instance skill id, and the resolved mechanism supplies copied-source, deterministic fixture, negative-case, and receipt evidence for bounded instance repair.

statement: Microcosm Batch10 Cold Eval Honesty Capsule Refine Instance
title: Microcosm Batch10 Cold Eval Honesty Capsule Refine Instance
triggers: A Batch 10 cold-eval honesty instance has stale or weak copied-source refs, scorecard-shape fixtures, negative cases, receipts, or claim-ceiling language.
The correction can stay within public fixture evidence and body-free receipts without granting live benchmark, provider, source, release, or publication authority.
workflow: Inspect the standard, organ atlas row, runtime source locus, copied cold-eval source module, mechanism evidence, receipts, generated health, and authority boundary before mutation.
Change only fields that tighten copied source refs, scorecard-shape evidence, validator binding, receipt expectations, negative cases, authority ceiling, or anti-claim wording.
Regenerate projections and preserve live-benchmark, navigation-truth, provider, source-authority, publication, release, private-equivalence, and whole-system claims as residual pressure.
